published_prior_art.cite: DudikLangfordLi2011: DR contextual-bandit OPE recovers the target under correct logging/reward calibration.

repo_prior_art.cite: ThmSmith/doc/API.md §3: PartialID catalogue empty at seed time

published_prior_art.cite: IshikawaHe2023 and ZhangXuTan2025 are closest, but neither imposes this paired pointwise propensity-divergence plus sup-norm nominal arm-mean tube for a contextual-bandit policy value.

repo_prior_art.cite: ThmSmith/doc/API.md §3: PartialID catalogue empty at seed time

published_prior_art.cite: KallusZhou2020, HessFrauenMelnychukFeuerriegel2026, and ZhangXuTan2025 give sharp or simultaneous sensitivity comparators, but not this open-set non-rectangularity for the joint latent-response program.

soundness_flags.label: Locked parameters
soundness_flags.one_line: The locked block defines e_star(a|x,y_vec)=P(A=a|X=x,Y_vec=y_vec), but P is the observed law of (X,A,Y); this should be Q or an explicitly full-data law because Y_vec is not in observed P.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Patch the locked-parameter block and its repeated setup copy to define e_star under the compatible full-data law Q, not the observed law P.

Add IshikawaHe2023 to the drafter-emitted literature checklist for Conjecture 1, since it is the closest contextual-bandit f-divergence sharp-bound comparator even though the proposal already cites it.

For Conjecture 2, include a concrete two-action numerical witness template with non-endpoint factual reward variation; this would make the open-set non-rectangularity claim easier to audit in Stage 0.

recommended_next_step: Make the one-line Q-vs-P locked-parameter patch, keep the novelty kernel, and advance without a pivot.
